faq.q: What is the best time to visit Panchghagh Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Panchghagh Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Panchghagh Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (40 km) and the nearest railway station is Ranchi Junction (46 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Panchghagh Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Panchghagh Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Panchghagh Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Panchghagh Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Panchghagh Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Murhu, Murhu block.
